response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on coding skills across multiple languages, and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or enterprise-scale telemetry frameworks — key requirements for this Principal role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., DLang, microservices at scale)
Proven ability to build and ship cross-team tools and open-source platforms (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout automation systems
Limited visibility into metrics, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience tied to growth systems
AI tool usage for engineering velocity is mentioned vaguely (AI-agent infrastructure) without concrete impact or scale
